description: Photos by Dekler Ph, Tamas Pap, Kaylyn Mok, Mary Oloumi, Max Anderson, Fabio Alves and Vanessa Serpas on Unsplash, and rawpixel.com on Freepik. Icon by Freepik.

designer.description: I am a graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and photography. Currently working freelance and open for new work!

Hey, good news! Get FREE shipping in orders over $100 or get 50% off in your delivery with the code 'HATSOFF'

 
 

"Shopping at The Hat Store has completely elevated my style, my creativity and — their beautiful, high quality textiles have both challenged and inspired me, and I wouldn’t be the maker I am today without them!"

Jessica Nicole, Hatson Blog
Los Angeles, U.S.A.
